summary: Excellent matrix recording captures a fire‑filled 1983 show with scorching Let It Grow, Big Railroad Blues, China Rider and masterful drums/space.
review: The Hunter matrix of this October 1983 concert is praised as the best source on the Archive – crisp, clear and breathing new life into an already legendary performance.  Reviewers highlight a blazing first set (Big Railroad Blues, Let It Grow) and a second set that delivers China Rider, Playin', Saint Stephen and a superb Drums/Space stretch.

ai_rating.rationale: All seven reviews are overwhelmingly positive (average 4.9 stars), emphasizing both an outstanding musical performance and a superior matrix recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as the best version of this show, crystal‑clear mix, matrix works perfectly, 5‑star audio quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set fires on Let It Grow and Big Railroad Blues; second set builds with a tight China Rider, extended Playin'/China Doll, and climaxes with Saint Stephen and a masterful Drums/Space.

band_member_comments.Bob: Described as standing in the mouth of a dragon during Throwing Stones.
band_member_comments.Drums: Surreally masterful drums/space highlighted as a highlight of the show.
